content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
October 31, 1989 
Andrew Sargent, Campaign Manager 
Committee to Elect Kay Bara 
1 Peppertree Drive 
Rancho Palos Verdes, CA 90274 
Dear Mr. Sargent: 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. A-89~ 
You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to 
you concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act. 1i 
Your letter, dated September 28, 1989, correctly summarizes my 
advice. 
Loans are subject to the same limitations as other monetary 
and non-monetary contributions and you may not make loans or 
contributions aggregating more than $1,000 per fiscal year to a 
candidate. 
Although you have also correctly summarized my advice that 
the loan you made to Ms. Bara should be shown corning in on Schedule B 
of Form 490 and returned on Schedule E, we have reconsidered that 
advice. 
The committee should disclose receipt of the loan on Part 1 
of Schedule B and reflect the return on Part 2 of Schedule B. 
This is 
necessary to properly reflect the committee's outstanding loan balance 
on the summary page. 
Expenses which were paid directly by the candidate should be 
disclosed as monetary contributions on Schedule A and as expenditures 
on Schedule E. 
Expenditures of $100 or more must be itemized, but 
expenditures under $100 can be lumped together on Line 2 of the 
Summary at the bottom of Schedule E. 
Please contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have any additional 
questions. 
Sincerely, 
Kathryn E. Donovan 
Gen:ral cou\el

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804#0807 .. (916)322#5660 


California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Andrew Sargent 
campaign Manager 
October 2, 1989 
committee to Elect Kay Bara 
1 Peppertree Drive 
Rancho Palos Verdes, CA 
90274 
Re: 
Letter No. 89-567 
Dear Mr. Sargent: 
We received your letter requesting confirmation of advice 
under the Political Reform Act on October 2, 1989. 
Your letter 
has been assigned to our Technical Assistance and Analysis 
Division for response. 
If you have any questions, you may contact 
that division directly at (916) 322-5662. 
If the letter is appropriate for confirmation without further 
analysis, we will attempt to expedite our response. 
A confirming 
response will be released after it has gone through our approval 
process. 
If the letter is not appropriate for this treatment, the 
staff person assigned to prepare the response will contact you 
shortly to advise you. 
In such cases, the normal analysis, review 
and approval process will be followed. 
You should be aware that your letter and our response are 
public records which may be disclosed to any interested person 
upon receipt of a proper request for disclosure. 
KED:plh:confadv1 
Sincerely, 
Kathryn E. Donovan 
General Counsel 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • 
P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804,0807 • (916) 322,5660 


ELECT KAY BARA 
RPV CITY COUNCIL 
COMMITTEE TO ELECT KAY BARA 
I Peppertree Drive 
Rancho Palos Verdes, CA 90274 
(213) 541-1914
